LanguageData.FCP_Faction_Caesars_Legion.description: Caesar’s Legion is the fearsome group which conquered most of the former states of Arizona, New Mexico, Colorado, and Utah. The Legion styles itself after the 古老 roman legionnaires and uses many low-tech weapons such as javelins and crude but effective melee weapons. They are cruel, warlike, and known to frequently commit massacres against civilians, which they view as dissolute and profligate. Caesar, or Edward Sallow as he was once known, leads his slave armies as an iron fisted dictator and pushes them ever forward to claim new territories for their leader, the self-proclaimed son of Mars himself. Before long, the Legion stood at the shores of the Colorado river and set their eyes on the gleaming towers of New Vegas and California beyond them.
LanguageData.FCP_Faction_Caesars_Legion.ideoDescripti: 凯撒是火星之子，奉火星之命征服整个地球。为了促进这一征服，火星用火净化了地球，使人类陷入了最低潮。凯撒的神圣职责是将荒原从混乱和野蛮中拯救出来
LanguageData.FCP_Faction_Caesars_Legion.label: 凯撒军团
